nodes.context: Irish American organized crime gang based in Charlestown, Boston, involved in racketeering, gambling, loan sharking.
Irish mob group from Somerville, Massachusetts, led by James 'Buddy' McLean, rival of the Charlestown Gang.
Mafia family based in New England, allied with the Charlestown Gang for contract killings.
Mafia family based in New York City, allied with the Charlestown Gang for contract killings.

edges.context: The two gangs engaged in a violent gang war from 1961 to 1966, resulting in multiple deaths.
The Charlestown Gang carried out contract killings for the Patriarca crime family.
The Charlestown Gang carried out contract killings for the Genovese crime family.
